pathAssistantSteps.info:
• Ensure resolution documented

• Confirm user satisfaction

• Close incident only after verification

• Confirm with requester that issue is resolved

• Capture feedback from the user

• If issue reoccurs reopen incident

• Support engineer should start investigation

• Update work notes regularly

• Communicate with requester if additional details required

• Check logs or system monitoring tools

• Capture clear incident subject

• Add complete description of the issue

• Select correct impact and urgency

• Verify reported method (Portal / Email / Phone)

• Assign incident to correct support group

• Verify priority level

• Check if this incident is related to any parent incident

• If multiple users are impacted, mark as Major Incident

• Create a Problem record if issue is recurring

• Link the incident to problem management

• Document known error

• Document the resolution clearly

• Mention root cause if identified

• Inform requester that issue has been resolved
